steps.title: Track the nature images
steps.content: The poem builds its setting through successive images: wild rice, a lizard, a goose, cranes, twilight, vapors, sedges, and sleeping marshes. The structure is descriptive rather than argumentative or narrative.

steps.title: Reject false organizing patterns
steps.content: Choice A wrongly says the poem first names animals and then plants. Choice C invents an extended comparison to human emotions. Choice D invents a person living in the place. The answer is B.
